title: Spin-offs
body:
This modpack added contents from other Minecraft Spin-offs, including:
- Minecraft Earth
- Minecraft Legends
- Minecraft Dungeons
- Minecraft Education Edition
- Minecraft Story Mode
- April Fools
- Bedrock Edition

<details>
<summary>April Fools</summary>

- Added April Fools features, including: Mobs (Diamond chicken, pink wither,..) Items(VR glasses, poisonous potatoes,...) and blocks (Spleaves, obsidian boat,...)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Bedrock Edition</summary>

- Potion in the cauldron
- Bedrock bridging mechanic
- Jokey variants
- Amor stands with hands
- Hidden blocks

</details>


<details>
<summary>Minecraft Legends</summary>
  
A piglin's invasion. You need to gather up the ally mobs and deal with them. You can also craft eggs and spawn them by yourself.
## Allies
![Allies mob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UfigaANl/images/7e2ca9345e1865d3033539b54d86a17f8d18627c_350.webp)
## Piglins
![Piglins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XYyj8XIc/images/15d57ef9e603e281a7f3cc9f05ff226eeeec0974_350.webp)
## Golems
![Golems](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XYyj8XIc/images/1c9db0ded9e4e87f6292c7a4a903717a594858e3.png)
 
</details>



<details>
<summary>Minecraft Dungeons</summary>
  
Now, Illager is stronger than before with more campaigns and outposts. Also, the new unit makes it more challenging to deal with them.

# Minecraft Dungeons
## Illagers
![Illagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1b9909e6ec90a4c6c6b81691a98c099dccf57f9.png)
## Paintings
![Paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xyKIycVT/images/0abdceecf0d0c039643cb79bd2932e89886a9cc7.png)
## Orb of Dominance items
![orb of dominance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BH2FxdYX/images/128ec8c80911e7c252d4657e3ab46542f187173c.png)
## Armors
![armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oMitr7dU/images/2d96ab733184d43a577f41d017ece5d9cc4e4680.png)
## Wildfire
![wildfire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/NrWDtgVf/images/32c11d18d2729a80f027580a9ebc8c12a971b87d.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Education Edition</summary>

Things for educational purposes. Such as:

Agent Golem: A golem that you can enter code into, and it will run exactly what you assign it for.
![d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kSwoh2Kg/images/d722bfa9bdf2d9dd9991d9f81093e510b9c305ff_350.webp)

Periodic table including 118 elements.
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AgZRfe77/images/04b23700000b99fc411ea72d647b7aee7e04b1f0.png)

![Balloons](https://imgur.com/l64Hx8K)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Minecraft Earth</summary>

This Spin-off added a bunch of new mobs:

![a](https://i.imgur.com/Jid8OzL.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Story Mode</summary>

Structure
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a394653791e71524793fe1f92264289afd46eab8_0.webp)

</details>





**Please support me by downloading this modpack.**
